title: std-d-db-last-audited-audit-aging
description: Last Audited Auditee Aging widget — exposes the top 5 auditees with the highest gap since their last audit and the aggregate count/percentage of auditees exceeding the 90-day threshold. Auditees created without any schedules are excluded from all metrics.

totalAuditees.description: Total number of unique auditees that have at least one schedule in the system. Auditees with no schedules are excluded.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this payload was generated.

disclaimer.description: Footnote that must appear verbatim in every narrator output. Fixed value: '* Auditees created without any schedules are not included in the above summary.'

agingAboveThreshold.description: Aggregate metrics for auditees whose gap since last audit exceeds the threshold.

thresholdDays.description: Threshold in days used to classify an auditee as 'aging'. Current value: 90.

count.description: Number of auditees whose differenceInDays > thresholdDays.

top5AgingAuditees.description: Top 5 auditees with the highest differenceInDays among those exceeding thresholdDays, sorted descending by differenceInDays.

items.description: Auditee records sorted by differenceInDays descending. Up to 5 entries.

lastScheduleCreatedDate.description: Date the most recent audit schedule was created for this auditee. Format: DD-MMM-YYYY.

differenceInDays.description: Number of days elapsed since lastScheduleCreatedDate as of the report date.
